description_long: This is a tall, freestanding rectangular banner with a blue geometric pattern and the word 'Qseg' prominently displayed in white on the front. The banner is vertically oriented and supported by a slim, metallic frame with two horizontal stabilizing feet at the base. The sides of the banner are extremely narrow, revealing the thinness of the structure and the supporting frame. The surface appears to be made of a smooth, synthetic fabric or vinyl material stretched tightly over the frame. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for use in public or commercial spaces. The banner is lightweight and portable, intended for temporary or semi-permanent display.
description: A tall, vertical blue banner with a geometric pattern and 'Qseg' logo, supported by a slim metal frame and stabilizing feet. The surface is smooth and professional, ideal for public or commercial display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blue geometric pattern and 'Qseg' logo, with the banner's rectangular shape and metal feet visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extreme thinness of the banner and the slim metal frame, with both horizontal stabilizing feet visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same blue geometric pattern and 'Qseg' logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and metal frame with stabilizing feet.
